## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass (Python)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes (Python)
- [ ] `vp check` passes (root)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavioural changes
- [ ] Updated `packages/python/docs/` or example agents if the public API changed
